creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #6)
Thank you for taking.

Attachment 166251 can not be commited before uploading epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.6.3-1lsb3.2.tar.gz like http://distcache.freebsd.org/local-distfiles/hrs/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.6.1-1lsb3.2.tar.gz .

We can get epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.6.3-1lsb3.2.tar.gz of ESC/P-R Driver (generic driver) from http://download.ebz.epson.net/dsc/search/01/search/?OSC=LX .
But, EPSON's download site is used URL generated with hash(filename+expire_time), maybe. It can not be specified directly.
